scripts.build-deploy-dev(backup): tsc && vite build --mode dev && copy web.config build\DEV\dist && xcopy /E /I build\DEV\dist \\10.100.77.240\deploy_web_dev\CAS\WEB\dist
scripts.build-deploy-dev: powershell -Command "& { $currentDate = Get-Date -Format yyyyMMdd; $path = '\\10.100.77.240\deploy_web_dev\CAS\WEB\dist'; $backupPath = \"${path}_$currentDate\"; if (Test-Path $backupPath) { Write-Host 'Backup already exists for today. Skipping backup...'; } else { Write-Host 'Creating backup at' $backupPath; xcopy /E /I /Y $path $backupPath | Out-Host; } }" && tsc && vite build --mode dev && copy web.config build\DEV\dist && xcopy /E /I build\DEV\dist \\10.100.77.240\deploy_web_dev\CAS\WEB\dist

Skipping backup...'; } else { Write-Host 'Creating backup at' $backupPath; xcopy /E /I /Y $path $backupPath | Out-Host; } }" && tsc && vite build --mode uat && copy web.config build\UAT\dist && xcopy /E /I build\UAT\dist \\10.100.77.243\WEB_UAT\HQ\CAS\WEB\dist
